About SEOplant

SEOplant was born from a simple observation: every AI website builder is terrible at SEO, and every SEO tool can't build a website.

The Gap We Fill

In 2024-2025, dozens of "AI website builders" launched. Durable, 10Web, Wix AI, Framer AI. They can generate a website in 30 seconds. But none of them understand SEO — they don't do keyword research, don't analyze competitors, don't generate topic clusters, don't build programmatic content.

On the other side, SEO tools like Byword, Surfer SEO, and Frase are great at content strategy and keyword analysis. But after they give you a content plan, you're on your own — you still need to build the website, configure the server, set up Schema markup, and deploy everything.

SEOplant connects these two worlds. It's the first platform that takes a keyword as input and produces a live, SEO-optimized website as output. Not just content — the entire site.

Our Philosophy

We believe the methodology should be transparent. You can see exactly how our pipeline works, from competitor analysis to deployment.

The cloud platform (seoplant.io) adds real-time SEO data, AI agent orchestration, and programmatic SEO at scale. But you're never locked in — your generated site is a standard Astro project that you can deploy anywhere.

Philosophy

  • No vendor lock-in. Your code, your server, your data. Always.
  • SEO-first, not design-first. Pretty sites that don't rank are invisible.
  • Automate the boring. Keyword research, schema markup, internal linking, deployment — machines should do this.
  • Human creativity on top. AI handles the heavy lifting; humans add soul, nuance, and strategy.

Contact

Questions, feedback, or partnership inquiries: hello@seoplant.io

GitHub: github.com/seoplant/seoplant
